# Bug Report

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened?

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

- [ ] Scripts

## Severity
- [ ] Critical - Blocks usage entirely
- [ ] High - Major functionality impacted
- [ ] Medium - Workaround available
- [ ] Low - Cosmetic or minor issue

Paste any relevant logs or error messages here
